Procurement governance record#

Template ID: tpl-procurement
Version: 1.0.0
Status: educational starter; not legal advice, procurement approval, certification, or a production control.

Related gates: Classify, Assess, Control
Starter controls: ctrl-purpose-boundary, ctrl-third-party-due-diligence, ctrl-data-provenance

Decision context#

  • Case ID:
  • Business owner:
  • Procurement owner:
  • Intended purpose and affected stakeholders:
  • Prohibited uses:
  • Non-AI and in-house alternatives considered:
  • Proposed decision: proceed / conditions / hold / redesign / stop

Supplier and dependency record#

Item Supplier response Evidence reference Reviewer Status
Hosting and processing locations Open
Model and material subprocessors Open
Training and customer-data use Open
Security and incident notification Open
Material change notification Open
Audit and assurance evidence Open
Export, deletion, continuity and exit Open

Control conditions#

  • Required human authority:
  • Data boundaries:
  • Technical restrictions:
  • Monitoring and indicators:
  • Contract conditions:
  • Unresolved exceptions and accountable acceptor:

Source status#

List primary sources with publisher, URL, checked date, next review date and status. A source link does not establish applicability or current legal effect.

Approval#

  • Decision owner:
  • Decision and conditions:
  • Evidence gaps:
  • Review/reopening triggers:
  • Date:
PrerequisiteNo specialist prerequisite stated
Recommended next stepReturn to the Documentation Library

Privacy-first feedback

Help improve this guide

Your feedback stays in your browser until you explicitly copy it, download it, or open an email draft. Do not include secrets, personal data, credentials or production identifiers.

PALO public documentation. Developer preview boundaries apply.
